module_context.name: Actions Module
module_context.description: Patient action and workflow management module - handles action creation, lifecycle, and execution including bookings, appointments, referrals, and escalations
module_context.safety_class_rationale: Module that executes clinical workflow actions based on triage outcomes. Incorrect action execution (wrong appointments, failed referrals, missed escalations) can contribute to patient harm, but clinical decisions originate from triage engine.

software_items.name: actions
software_items.description: Patient action management service that creates and executes clinical workflow actions including bookings, appointments, referrals, and triage escalations

core_functionalities.name: Action Creation and Validation
core_functionalities.description: Creates and validates clinical workflow actions based on triage outcomes

core_functionalities.name: Appointment Booking
core_functionalities.description: Creates appointments and bookings with practitioners and care units

core_functionalities.name: Referral Management
core_functionalities.description: Creates referrals to practitioners with triage interview context

core_functionalities.name: Action Execution Lifecycle
core_functionalities.description: Manages action state transitions, execution, rollback, and failure handling

core_functionalities.name: Patient Identity Verification
core_functionalities.description: Verifies patient identity before action execution or cancellation

module_hazards.description: Action executed when already executed/cancelled causing duplicate interventions
module_hazards.potential_harm: Duplicate appointments, multiple referrals, redundant escalations leading to patient confusion or conflicting care plans

module_hazards.description: Appointment created without required patient or condition ID
module_hazards.potential_harm: Appointment created for wrong patient or without clinical context, leading to inappropriate care
Double-booked appointments, patient unable to access care at expected time

module_hazards.description: Referral created without triage interview context
module_hazards.potential_harm: Referral lacks clinical context, practitioner cannot understand patient needs
module_hazards.cross_item_impact: Practitioner receives referral without triage data

module_hazards.description: Action execution partially succeeds leaving inconsistent state
module_hazards.potential_harm: Patient has booking but no appointment, or vice versa, leading to administrative errors
Patient accesses another patient's care plan, confidentiality breach, wrong treatment delivered

module_hazards.description: Upstream service failure causes action failure without clear communication
module_hazards.potential_harm: Patient believes action succeeded when it failed, missed appointments or delayed care
module_hazards.cross_item_impact: Depends on health-manager, bookings, interviewer availability

module_hazards.description: Action expires before patient can execute blocking urgent care
module_hazards.potential_harm: Patient unable to book urgent appointment, delayed care for acute conditions

failure_modes.name: Action template misconfigured
failure_modes.effect_on_module: Action creation fails, user workflow interrupted
failure_modes.effect_on_system: Patient cannot proceed with intended action

failure_modes.name: Invalid origin or option configuration
failure_modes.effect_on_module: Action creation fails with validation error
failure_modes.effect_on_system: Patient may be blocked from accessing care

failure_modes.name: Health-manager service unavailable
failure_modes.effect_on_module: Appointment/referral creation fails, action marked as failed
failure_modes.effect_on_system: Patient cannot create appointment, must retry later

failure_modes.name: Bookings service unavailable
failure_modes.effect_on_module: Booking creation fails, timeslot rolled back if created
failure_modes.effect_on_system: Patient cannot book appointment, must retry

failure_modes.name: Interview service failure when fetching triage result
failure_modes.effect_on_module: Referral created without patient recommendation text

failure_modes.name: Concurrent action execution attempt
failure_modes.effect_on_module: Optimistic locking exception, one execution fails
failure_modes.effect_on_system: Patient may see error or success depending on request

failure_modes.name: Timeslot already taken
failure_modes.effect_on_module: Booking fails, patient prompted to select new timeslot
failure_modes.effect_on_system: Patient loses selected timeslot, may cause action expiration

failure_modes.name: Patient verification fails
failure_modes.effect_on_system: Patient blocked, logged as security issue

module_risk_controls.implementation: Action.assertActive() validates status, execution time, expiration before allowing execution
Returns existing result if same option already executed successfully

module_risk_controls.description: Patient ID and condition ID validation
module_risk_controls.implementation: Throws exception if patientId or conditionId is null before appointment creation
verifyPatient() validates patient ID matches action's patient
Each executor implements rollback() to undo changes when chain fails
Throws exception if triageInterviewId is empty before referral creation

module_risk_controls.description: Exception mapping for upstream service failures
module_risk_controls.implementation: Service-specific exception mappers convert errors to user-facing messages

module_risk_controls.description: Metrics and monitoring for action execution
module_risk_controls.implementation: Micrometer timers and counters track execution, results, rollback failures

module_risk_controls_required_upstream.description: User training on action expiration and time sensitivity
module_risk_controls_required_upstream.rationale: Software cannot force users to execute actions before expiration

module_risk_controls_required_upstream.description: Monitoring and alerting for high rollback rates
module_risk_controls_required_upstream.rationale: Module logs rollbacks but system-level patterns require centralized monitoring

module_risk_controls_required_upstream.description: Action template review and approval process
module_risk_controls_required_upstream.rationale: Software validates structure but cannot assess clinical appropriateness

module_risk_controls_required_upstream.description: SLA monitoring for upstream service dependencies
module_risk_controls_required_upstream.rationale: Module depends on health-manager, bookings, interviewer availability

cross_item_interfaces.name: Health-manager REST API
cross_item_interfaces.safety_impact: Appointment/referral creation failure prevents patient care access
cross_item_interfaces.data_exchanged: Appointment details, referral data, patient context
cross_item_interfaces.failure_handling: WebApplicationException caught, mapped to user errors, rollback triggered

cross_item_interfaces.name: Bookings REST API
cross_item_interfaces.safety_impact: Booking creation failure prevents securing appointment slot
cross_item_interfaces.failure_handling: Timeslot conflicts handled with task reset, general failures require retry

cross_item_interfaces.name: Interviewer REST API
cross_item_interfaces.safety_impact: Failure means referrals lack clinical context
cross_item_interfaces.failure_handling: Null check, referral proceeds without recommendation text

cross_item_interfaces.name: JMS Action Events
cross_item_interfaces.safety_impact: Failed notifications mean downstream systems have stale status
cross_item_interfaces.failure_handling: JMS broker-level retry and dead-letter queue

module_verification_gaps.description: State validation logic lacks comprehensive edge case tests
module_verification_gaps.recommendation: Add tests for concurrent execution, expiration boundaries, timezone handling

module_verification_gaps.description: Rollback mechanism success rate not verified via integration tests
module_verification_gaps.recommendation: Add tests simulating failures at each executor, verify all changes rolled back

module_verification_gaps.description: Database transaction failure scenarios not tested
module_verification_gaps.recommendation: Add chaos testing for database failures

module_verification_gaps.description: Care unit resolution from multiple sources not fully tested
module_verification_gaps.recommendation: Add tests for conflicting care unit IDs

aggregation_summary.notes: Single-item module with heavy external dependencies. Primary safety concerns are action state management and rollback mechanism reliability.
